commits.subject: fix(TC-31): correct the remaining "source_id is graph-arm-only" stale contract (fix-1)

primary_fix.rationale: Asserts the hit carries ITS OWN row's written source_id, not merely non-None. Stale comment claiming 'None for every two-arm hit (only graph-arm hits carry it)' rewritten.

sweep.method: repo-wide grep over .rs/.py/.ts/.js/.md for source_id.is_none, 'source_id is None', 'source_id == None', 'source_id: None', sourceId===null/toBeNull, and prose 'only graph-arm' / 'graph-arm only' / 'None for every two-arm' / 'set only for graph-arm'

fixed.note: the verified live failure; now asserts equality with the written source_id
SearchHit docstring said "`None` for every two-arm hit"; now states every-hit population + the real NULL cases
SearchHit.sourceId said "`null` for every two-arm hit"
"# G0 Phase-2 provenance; set only for graph-arm hits"; also added a prose paragraph documenting source_id, which was previously undocumented despite being the erase_source argument
"// G0 Phase-2 provenance; set only for graph-arm hits"; same prose addition for sourceId/eraseSource

docstring + two inline comments called the source_id=None stubs 'a two-arm hit'. The stubs exercise _doc_id_of's fallback, still required for genuinely NULL-provenance rows, so no assertion changed; they are now described as a legacy NULL-provenance row.

left_deliberately.reason: rerank_passages synthetic passage — private adapter over caller-supplied tuples, no canonical row and no DB handle in scope; the hit never escapes to a caller. Populating it would fabricate provenance. (Explicitly reserved by 63dfbc08.)
text pre-step-8 legacy path — that schema has no source_id column at all, so None is the only truthful value.
in-memory SearchHit literal feeding a pure ranking function; asserts nothing about engine provenance.
same — test-helper SearchHit builder for RRF fusion.
same — test-helper SearchHit builder for recency reweighting.
same — test-helper SearchHit builders for the reranker.
compile-fail UI test — `source_id: None` MUST remain a compile error (R-20-E3). Inverting it would break mandatory provenance.
asserts a genuinely NULL-at-rest row reads back as None, not a fabricated value. Correct post-TC-31 contract.
§C-5: a NULL-source_id edge must yield a graph hit with source_id==None (no panic/skip). Correct post-TC-31 contract.

dated design/plan/status records (incl. STATUS-0.8.20.md:115, which correctly describes TC-31 AS the defect, and 0.8.1-g0-phase2-design.md, which records the original graph-arm-only design). Not rewritten — they record what was true when written.

sweep.third_instance_note: The orchestrator predicted a third instance. Found FIVE further sites beyond the Python test: two shipped SDK doc-comments (Py types.py, TS index.ts), one NAPI shim (binding.ts), and — most consequential — TWO PUBLISHED user-facing API reference docs (docs/reference/python-api.md, typescript-api.md) stating the wrong contract to end users.

not_verified_here.python_suite: no native build in a worktree — orchestrator runs in a fresh clone
not_verified_here.typescript_suite: same; no napi build in a worktree
not_verified_here.note: No maturin develop / pip install -e was run in this worktree.

constraints_honored.engine_behavior_unchanged: this commit touches only test assertions, doc-comments and published docs — zero engine/source logic

notes_for_orchestrator: Re-run the Python suite in a fresh clone: test_functional_search.py::test_functional_search_hit_shape_across_ffi should now PASS, and the assertion is strengthened to equality with the written source_id.

OBSERVED BUT NOT FIXED (out of TC-31 scope, separate staleness class): docs/reference/python-api.md:380 and typescript-api.md:348 still declare `id: int` / `id: number` with the comment 'canonical row write_cursor (interim identity carrier)'. That is stale since 0.8.19 C-2 retyped SearchHit.id to IdSpace. Same doc blocks I edited. Recommend a follow-up doc fix; I did not touch it to avoid scope creep.
The untracked dev/plans/runs/0.8.20-slice-10a-output.json (predecessor's closure file) was left untracked and uncommitted.
